item.title: DeepSeek 融资从 50 亿门槛降到 15 亿，梁文锋强调团队稳定
item.guid: DeepSeek-融资从-50-亿门槛降到-15-亿，梁文锋强调团队稳定
item.description:
"elsewhere" yesterday published an article disclosing multiple details about DeepSeek's financing process. 「elsewhere 别处发生」昨日发文披露 DeepSeek 融资过程中的多项细节。

The article stated that DeepSeek officially launched its financing in April this year, initially requiring a single institution's quota to be no less than 5 billion yuan, with no splitting of shares, and adopting an RMB structure; ultimately, the minimum investment amount for funds was reduced to 1.5 billion yuan, and participation methods became more flexible. 文章称，DeepSeek 今年 4 月正式启动融资，最初要求单家机构额度不低于 50 亿元、不能拆分份额，且采用人民币结构；最终基金最小出资额降至 15 亿元，参与方式也更灵活。

The article mentioned that DeepSeek organized an online investor conference in mid-May, where Liang Wenfeng spoke first, followed by answering investor questions. Many investors had not met Liang Wenfeng offline before, making this conference their first direct interaction. 文章提到，DeepSeek 5 月中旬曾组织一场线上投资人会议，由梁文锋先讲，再回答投资人问题。多位投资人此前没有线下见过梁文锋，这场会议成为他们第一次直接交流。

At the meeting, Liang Wenfeng repeatedly emphasized focusing only on things related to improving intelligence, maintaining team stability, and the talent risks beyond "money and resources." Additionally, one of Liang Wenfeng's key demands for big tech companies and VCs was not to poach DeepSeek's employees or instigate team members to start their own businesses . 梁文锋在会上反复强调，只做与提高智能有关的事情、保持团队稳定，以及「钱和资源」之外的人才风险。此外，梁文锋对大厂和 VC 的重要要求之一，是 不要挖 DeepSeek 的人或撺掇团队成员创业 。

Regarding the investor list, the article stated that only 10 institutions ultimately participated, but after penetrating the fund entities, the actual participants behind them were close to 100 institutions or individuals, including local state-owned assets, listed company-related entities, and industrial capital. 投资人名单方面，文章称最终仅有 10 家机构参与，但穿透基金主体后，背后实际参与方接近 100 家机构或个人，包括地方国资、上市公司相关主体和产业资本。

item.title: 曝 Manus 早期投资者拟 20 亿美元回购公司
item.guid: 曝-Manus-早期投资者拟-20-亿美元回购公司
item.description:
According to The Information, early Chinese investors in AI agent company Manus are planning to repurchase the company from Meta at the $2 billion price (approximately 13.5 billion RMB) Meta paid last year, with the repurchase transaction currently underway. 据《The Information》报道，AI 智能体公司 Manus 的早期中国投资者正计划以 Meta 去年收购时支付的 20 亿美元价格（约合 135 亿元人民币），将公司从 Meta 手中回购，目前回购交易仍在推进中。

The report states that HSG, ZhenFund, and Tencent will participate in this repurchase, with HSG and ZhenFund considering using new funds to repurchase Meta's stake, rather than asking limited partners who previously received distributions to return funds. U.S. venture capital firm Benchmark will not repurchase its originally held Manus shares. 报道称，HSG、真格基金和腾讯将参与此次回购，其中 HSG 和真格基金考虑使用新资金回购 Meta 持股，而不是要求此前已获得分配收益的有限合伙人返还资金。美国风投机构 Benchmark 则不会回购其原持有的 Manus 股份。

Manus is also considering adjusting its company structure to re-establish itself as a joint venture registered in China and prepare for a future IPO in Hong Kong. Manus 还在考虑调整公司架构，重新成为一家在中国注册的合资企业，并为未来赴港 IPO 做准备。

The report mentioned that Manus's revenue continued to grow rapidly after being acquired by Meta. Insiders stated that Manus's annualized revenue run rate has risen to $400-500 million in recent weeks, up from $100 million when it was acquired by Meta last December. 报道提到，Manus 被 Meta 收购后收入继续快速增长。知情人士称，Manus 最近几周的年化营收 run rate 已升至 4 亿至 5 亿美元，高于去年 12 月被 Meta 收购时的 1 亿美元。

item.title: Transformer 作者离开 Google 加入 OpenAI
item.guid: Transformer-作者离开-Google-加入-OpenAI
item.description:
Yesterday, Noam Shazeer, Google's VP of Engineering and co-lead for Gemini, announced on X that he has left Google to join OpenAI. 昨天，Google 工程副总裁、Gemini 共同负责人 Noam Shazeer 在 X 宣布，自己已离开 Google，加入 OpenAI。

Shazeer is one of the authors of the Transformer paper and also founded Character.AI. In 2024, Google brought him and part of his team back through an approximately $2.7 billion licensing deal, involving him in the leadership of the Gemini model. Shazeer 是 Transformer 论文作者之一，也曾创办 Character.AI。Google 2024 年通过约 27 亿美元授权交易把他和部分团队重新引回 Google，并让他参与 Gemini 模型领导工作。

🔗 Related reading: OpenAI just poached the author of Transformer 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，OpenAI 把 Transformer 作者挖走了

item.title: Counterpoint：第 20 周全球手机销量同比下降 8%，华为逆势增长 23%
item.guid: Counterpoint：第-20-周全球手机销量同比下降-8%，华为逆势增长-23%
item.description:
Yesterday, Counterpoint Research released its global smartphone sales tracker for week 20 of 2026, showing that global sales for the week decreased by 8% year-on-year, marking the ninth consecutive week of negative growth. 昨天，Counterpoint Research 发布 2026 年第 20 周全球智能手机销量追踪，数据显示当周全球销量同比下降 8%，已连续第九周负增长。

By brand, only Apple and Huawei among the top six brands achieved year-on-year growth. Apple's sales grew by 4% year-on-year, and Huawei's grew by 23%, making it the brand with the largest increase among the top six; Samsung remained relatively stable, while some Chinese smartphone manufacturers were affected by tight memory supply and rising costs. 分品牌看，前六大品牌中只有苹果和华为实现同比增长。苹果销量同比增长 4%，华为同比增长 23%，是前六名中增幅最大的品牌；三星保持相对平稳，部分中国手机厂商则受到存储供应紧张和成本上升影响。

item.title: 钉钉新 CEO 陈宇森发布首封全员信，成立核心平台业务部
item.guid: 钉钉新-CEO-陈宇森发布首封全员信，成立核心平台业务部
item.description:
Jiemian News disclosed yesterday that DingTalk's new CEO, Chen Yusen, issued his first all-hands letter since taking office, announcing organizational adjustments to the Wukong Business Unit. 界面新闻昨日披露，钉钉新 CEO 陈宇森发布上任后的首封全员信，对悟空事业部做出组织调整。

    Establish a Core Platform Business Unit, responsible for core businesses such as DingTalk;

    Integrate the Wukong and MuleRun teams to form a new Wukong team;

    Integrate the direct sales, telemarketing, service provider, pre-sales, delivery, and customer success teams into a Customer Development Department;

    Establish a Marketing Department;

    Establish a Corporate Information Technology Department, responsible for optimizing and iterating various business systems, making them easy for Agents to use.

item.title: 宁德时代一季度净利润超过 7 家头部车企总和
item.guid: 宁德时代一季度净利润超过-7-家头部车企总和
item.description:
According to Sina Auto, CATL's revenue in the first quarter of this year reached 129.131 billion yuan, with a net profit attributable to the parent company of 20.738 billion yuan. Against the backdrop of a 5.6% year-on-year decline in domestic car sales, this profit scale exceeded the combined profits of 7 leading Chinese brand car manufacturers. 据新浪汽车报道，宁德时代今年一季度营收达到 1291.31 亿元，归母净利润 207.38 亿元。在国内汽车销量同比下降 5.6% 的背景下，这一利润规模超过 7 家中国品牌头部车企利润总和。

Based on the full-year 2025 figures, CATL's net profit was 72.2 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 42.28%, with an average daily net profit of nearly 200 million yuan. 按 2025 年全年口径看，宁德时代净利润为 722 亿元，同比增长 42.28%，日均净赚近 2 亿元。

item.title: 零跑汽车全球累计交付达 150 万台
item.guid: 零跑汽车全球累计交付达-150-万台
item.description:
Leapmotor announced yesterday that its global cumulative deliveries have reached 1.5 million units. It took Leapmotor 8 months to go from 1 million to 1.5 million units. 零跑汽车昨日宣布，全球累计交付量已达到 150 万台。从 100 万台到 150 万台，零跑用时 8 个月。

The company's disclosed milestones show that Leapmotor completed its first delivery in June 2019, reached 500,000 units in October 2024, 1 million units in October 2025, and 1.5 million units in June 2026. 公司披露的节点显示，零跑 2019 年 6 月完成第 1 台交付，2024 年 10 月达到 50 万台，2025 年 10 月达到 100 万台，2026 年 6 月达到 150 万台。

item.title: 追觅系进行组织调整，手机、汽车、芯片业务归入产业研究院
item.guid: 追觅系进行组织调整，手机、汽车、芯片业务归入产业研究院
item.description:
According to KrASIA, Dreame Technology has recently been consolidating and adjusting its business units. Existing businesses will be merged into four main sectors: whole-house smart cleaning, smart home appliances, smart mobility, and AI embodied intelligence. Some BUs that have not yet launched actual business operations or deployed personnel will be canceled. 据硬氪报道，追觅系近日正在对各业务单元进行收缩和调整，现有业务将合并为四大主营板块，包括全屋智能清洁、智能家电、智慧出行和 AI 具身智能。一些尚未开展实际业务落地及人员落地的 BU 将被取消。

The report states that the smart cleaning sector currently has nearly 12,000 employees, accounting for over 50% of the company's total workforce, with more than 70% being R&D personnel. After the adjustment, Dreame Technology will sell related products through brands such as Dreame, MOVA, NAVEE, SKYMOTOR, and Magic Atom. 报道称，智能清洁板块目前人员接近 1.2 万人，占公司整体人数超过 5 成，其中七成以上为研发人员。调整后，追觅系将通过追觅、MOVA、坦途（NAVEE）、首驱（SKYMOTOR）、魔法原子等品牌对外销售相关产品。

Dreame will also establish an industrial research institute, where asset-heavy, R&D-intensive, and long-cycle businesses such as mobile phones, automobiles, and chips will be integrated, focusing on technological R&D and the implementation of industry-academia-research collaborations. 追觅还将设立产业研究院，手机、汽车、芯片等重资产、重研发、长周期业务将归入研究院，聚焦技术研发和产学研落地。

The report mentioned that Dreame Technology's overall layoff ratio this time is about 12%. Most functional, R&D, and sales personnel with transferable skills can be transferred to other businesses through internal mobility channels; laid-off employees will receive compensation packages ranging from 0.5 to N+1, depending on their business line and individual circumstances. 报道提到，追觅系本次总体裁撤比例约为 12%，多数技能可复用的职能、研发和销售人员可通过内部活水渠道转入其他业务；被裁撤员工将根据业务线及个人情况获得 0.5-N+1 不等的赔付方案。

item.title: 曹操出行宣布 RoboX 战略，2030 年部署 10 万辆 Robotaxi
item.guid: 曹操出行宣布-RoboX-战略，2030-年部署-10-万辆-Robotaxi
item.description:
According to Cover News, Caocao Mobility yesterday unveiled its RoboX strategy at the 2026 International Automotive and Supply Chain Expo (Hong Kong), planning to build an intelligent transportation capacity system covering scenarios such as Robotaxi and Robovan. 据封面新闻报道，曹操出行昨日在 2026 国际汽车及供应链博览会（香港）上发布 RoboX 战略，计划构建覆盖 Robotaxi、Robovan 等场景的智能运力体系。

The company proposed a 'Double 100,000 Plan': to cumulatively deploy 100,000 Robotaxis and 100,000 Robovans by 2030. 公司提出「双十万计划」：到 2030 年累计部署 10 万辆 Robotaxi 与 10 万辆 Robovan。

Caocao Mobility also announced the launch of a comprehensive AI transformation, establishing an AI business unit, and reaching a strategic cooperation with Geely Remote New Energy Commercial Vehicle to promote the large-scale implementation of Robovans focusing on new energy commercial vehicles and logistics scenario operations. 曹操出行同时宣布启动全面 AI 转型，成立 AI 事业部，并与吉利远程新能源商用车达成战略合作，围绕新能源商用车和物流场景运营推进 Robovan 规模化落地。

Caocao Mobility disclosed in its 2025 annual report that it has deployed over 100 Robotaxis and is advancing its overseas company layout in Abu Dhabi. The company's customized Robotaxi is planned for mass production starting in 2027, gradually expanding to more cities and international markets. 曹操出行在 2025 年年报中披露，其 Robotaxi 已部署超 100 辆，并在阿布扎比推进海外公司布局。公司定制 Robotaxi 计划 2027 年开始量产，并逐步拓展至更多城市和国际市场。

item.title: 💡 亚马逊创始人：AI 可能创造劳动力短缺，而不是大规模失业
item.guid: 💡-亚马逊创始人：AI-可能创造劳动力短缺，而不是大规模失业
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Amazon founder Jeff Bezos stated yesterday at the VivaTech technology summit in Paris that AI will not eliminate jobs but will instead cause labor shortages. 据《商业内幕》报道，亚马逊创始人杰夫·贝索斯 (Jeff Bezos) 昨日在巴黎 VivaTech 科技峰会上表示，AI 不会消灭就业岗位，反而将造成劳动力短缺。

In his view, the core value of AI lies in lowering the barrier to putting ideas into practice. Bezos called this process the 'dream-build cycle,' believing that technological advancements will unlock a large number of ideas previously shelved due to excessively high execution costs. 在他看来，AI 的核心价值在于降低将创意付诸实践的门槛。贝索斯将这一过程称为「梦想-构建循环」，认为技术进步将解锁大量此前因执行成本过高而被搁置的想法。

I can guarantee that everyone here has had an idea for starting a business or developing a new product, but that idea ultimately didn't materialize, for a simple reason – it was too difficult, not worth doing... If we can accelerate this cycle, all ideas will become possible. We will no longer be limited by capability, but only by imagination.

He believes that as the execution barrier lowers, society's demand for builders, creators, and entrepreneurs who can bring ideas to fruition will rise, and the labor market will face a shortage rather than a surplus. 他认为，当执行门槛降低，社会对能够落地创意的建设者、创造者和创业者的需求将随之上升，人力市场将面临供不应求，而非过剩。

In his speech, Bezos also discussed the potential impact of AI on space exploration, stating that if space travel becomes sufficiently reliable and low-cost, humanity might be able to relocate heavy industries to space, allowing Earth to gradually return to its natural state before the Industrial Revolution. 在演讲中，贝索斯还谈及 AI 对太空探索的潜在影响，称若太空旅行变得足够可靠且低成本，人类或许可将重工业迁移至太空，使地球逐步恢复至工业革命前的自然状态。

item.title: 37 万元起，猛士 M817 将于 6 月 27 日上市
item.guid: 37-万元起，猛士-M817-将于-6-月-27-日上市
item.description:
M-HERO Auto announced yesterday that the all-new M-HERO M817 will be officially launched on June 27. The vehicle previously made its global debut and started pre-sales at the 2026 Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area Auto Show, offering three versions: Pro+, Max+, and Ultra, with pre-sale prices ranging from 370,000 to 420,000 yuan. 猛士汽车昨日宣布，全新猛士 M817 将于 6 月 27 正式上市。该车此前在 2026 粤港澳大湾区车展完成全球首秀并启动预售，共推出 Pro+、Max+、Ultra 三个版本，预售价为 37 万至 42 万元。

  • The M-HERO M817 series is equipped with Huawei Qiankun Intelligent Driving ADS 5 and HarmonyOS Cockpit 6, features an 896-line dual-optical path image-level LiDAR, and has its intelligent driving system upgraded to P2P 3.0; 猛士 M817 全系搭载华为乾崑智驾 ADS 5 和鸿蒙座舱 6，配备 896 线双光路图像级激光雷达，智驾系统升级到 P2P 3.0；
  • Equipped with a 2.0T plug-in hybrid system, based on an 800V high-voltage platform, and features 6C supercharging; 搭载 2.0T 插混系统，基于 800V 高压平台，配备 6C 超充；
  • The Ultra version has front and rear motor powers of 240kW and 310kW respectively, accelerates from 0-100 km/h in 4.26 seconds, is equipped with a 62.52kWh battery pack, offers a CLTC pure electric range of 301km, a comprehensive range of 1450km, and fast charges from 30% to 80% SOC in 9.6 minutes. Ultra 版前后电机功率分别为 240kW 和 310kW，百公里加速 4.26 秒，搭载 62.52kWh 电池组，CLTC 纯电续航 301km，综合续航 1450km，SOC 30% 至 80% 快充 9.6 分钟。

item.title: DeepSeek 识图模式上线 App 和网页端
item.guid: DeepSeek-识图模式上线-App-和网页端
item.description:
DeepSeek multimodal researcher Xiaokang Chen posted on X yesterday that DeepSeek's 'Image Recognition Mode' has been officially launched on both web and app platforms. DeepSeek 多模态研究员 Xiaokang Chen 昨日在 X 发文表示，DeepSeek 的「识图模式」已在网页和 App 端正式上线。

"Image Recognition Mode" is alongside "Quick Mode" and "Expert Mode". After enabling it, users can directly upload images, allowing DeepSeek to perform image understanding and converse based on the image content. 「识图模式」与「快速模式」「专家模式」并列，用户开启后可以直接上传图片，让 DeepSeek 进行图像理解，并基于图片内容对话。

item.title: ChatGPT 推出定时任务功能
item.guid: ChatGPT-推出定时任务功能
item.description:
Yesterday, OpenAI began gradually rolling out a new scheduled task feature to ChatGPT users. Users can now have ChatGPT perform reminders, information organization, or recurring tasks at specified times. 昨天，OpenAI 开始逐步向 ChatGPT 用户推送全新定时任务功能。用户可以让 ChatGPT 在指定时间执行提醒、信息整理或固定周期任务。

The feature will add a dedicated "Scheduled Tasks" page to the sidebar, where users can centrally view ongoing tasks, their next run times, and pause, resume, edit, or delete tasks. 功能将在侧边栏新增独立的「定时任务」页面，用户可在该页面统一查看正在执行的任务、任务下次运行时间，并对任务进行暂停、恢复、编辑或删除。

item.title: Kimi Work 更新目标模式和插件中心
item.guid: Kimi-Work-更新目标模式和插件中心
item.description:
Yesterday, Kimi officially announced an update for Kimi Work (Beta) on the Kimi desktop client, adding two new capabilities: "Goal Mode" and "Plugin Center". 昨日，Kimi 官宣 Kimi Work（Beta 版）在 Kimi 电脑客户端迎来更新，新增「目标模式」和「插件中心」两项能力。

    "Goal Mode" is designed for long-duration tasks, with the official claim that it can work continuously for 24 hours. After users set a clear goal, Kimi can continuously advance the task around that goal, adjusting its strategy during execution based on the current status and the gap to the goal;

    The "Plugin Center" has added plugins for office collaboration, design, note-taking, and website development, including Baidu Netdisk, DingTalk, Feishu, WPS, Canva, Notion, Cloudflare, and more. After installation, users can type a slash "/" in the chat box to invoke the corresponding plugin.

The official team also launched a June "50% off" benefit, where the membership quota consumption for all tasks using Kimi desktop client's Work mode will be halved. 官方同步推出六月「5折」福利，使用 Kimi 电脑客户端 Work 模式的所有任务，会员额度消耗将减半。

item.title: 小米开源全屋智能 AI 方案 Miloco 2.0，支持长期家庭任务
item.guid: 小米开源全屋智能-AI-方案-Miloco-2.0，支持长期家庭任务
item.description:
Yesterday, Xiaomi officially released Miloco 2.0, an open-source whole-home smart AI solution centered on the MiMo large model, targeting smart home scenarios and positioned as an "AI Smart Butler". 小米昨日正式发布以 MiMo 大模型为核心的全屋智能 AI 开源方案 Miloco 2.0，面向智能家居场景，定位为「AI 智能管家」。

Compared to Miloco 1.0, released last November, Miloco 2.0 has upgraded from being primarily rule-driven to supporting long-term task follow-up and proactive intelligence. It integrates with OpenClaw via an AI agent format, supporting one-click installation and deployment. 相比去年 11 月发布的 Miloco 1.0，Miloco 2.0 从以规则驱动为主，进一步升级为支持长期任务跟进和主动智能，通过 AI 智能体形式接入 OpenClaw，支持一键安装和部署。

item.title: Orange Pi 6 标准版开发板亮相，AI 算力 45 TOPS
item.guid: Orange-Pi-6-标准版开发板亮相，AI-算力-45-TOPS
item.description:
Orange Pi has launched the Orange Pi 6 Standard Edition development board, featuring a 12-core CD8180 processor, with optional 8GB, 16GB, and 24GB RAM, and a nominal AI computing power of 45 TOPS. 香橙派推出 Orange Pi 6 标准版开发板，搭载 12 核 CD8180 处理器，可选 8GB、16GB 和 24GB RAM，AI 算力标称 45 TOPS。

This development board is also equipped with an Immortalis GPU, targeting development scenarios such as edge AI, robotics, visual recognition, and local inference. Higher memory versions can accommodate larger multimodal models, vision pipelines, and local services. 这块开发板还配备 Immortalis GPU，面向边缘 AI、机器人、视觉识别和本地推理等开发场景。较高内存版本可以承接更大的多模态模型、视觉管线和本地服务。

item.title: 《GTA VI》预购时间官宣
item.guid: 《GTA-VI》预购时间官宣
item.description:
Rockstar Games announced yesterday that pre-orders for Grand Theft Auto VI will open on June 25, supporting PS5 and Xbox Series X/S platforms. Rockstar Games 昨天宣布，《Grand Theft Auto VI》将于 6 月 25 日开启预购，支持 PS5 和 Xbox Series X/S 平台。

Currently, players can add Grand Theft Auto VI to their wishlists on the PlayStation Store or Microsoft Store to receive notifications when pre-orders become available. 目前，玩家已可在 PlayStation Store 或 Microsoft Store 将《Grand Theft Auto VI》加入愿望单，以便在预购开放时收到提醒。

In a previous announcement, Rockstar Games confirmed that Grand Theft Auto VI is currently scheduled for release on November 19 this year. 在此前公告中，Rockstar Games 已确认《Grand Theft Auto VI》目前计划于今年 11 月 19 日发售。

item.title: 胖东来回应自营商品降价：原材料和产量变化降低成本
item.guid: 胖东来回应自营商品降价：原材料和产量变化降低成本
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, some netizens recently posted that Pang Dong Lai has lowered prices for several of its own-brand products. On the morning of June 18, a staff member at a Pang Dong Lai store in Xuchang confirmed that some of their own products, including juices and oat flakes, have indeed had their prices adjusted. 据界面新闻报道，近日有网友发文称胖东来多款自营产品下调价格。6 月 18 日上午，胖东来许昌一门店工作人员确认，目前确有部分自有产品调整价格，包括果汁、燕麦片等品类。

According to previous visits by Dahe Daily and Hebei News Network, Pang Dong Lai's own-brand mango composite juice and peach juice, among others, have dropped from 13 yuan per bottle to 11 yuan per bottle, with a 12 yuan price reduction for a whole box; instant oat buckets and quick-cooking oat buckets have decreased from 187.8 yuan per box to 171 yuan; some soy sauce products have also been reduced. 据大河报和河北新闻网此前走访，胖东来自营芒果复合汁、水蜜桃汁等由 13 元一瓶降至 11 元一瓶，整箱降价 12 元；即食燕麦桶和快熟燕麦桶每箱从 187.8 元降至 171 元；部分酱油产品也有下调。

Staff told Jiemian News that the price adjustment was mainly due to changes in raw material prices and cost reductions brought about by increased production. The store stated that the supermarket does not offer price matching for higher purchases, but returns can be made at offline stores with a shopping receipt within 7 days from the date of purchase, provided the goods are unopened and do not affect secondary sales. 工作人员向界面新闻称，调价主要因为相关原材料价格调整和产量增加带来的成本降低；门店表示超市没有买贵补差处理，但自购买之日起 7 日内、货品未开封且不影响二次销售的，可凭购物凭证到线下门店退货。

item.title: 货拉拉回应被市场监管总局约谈
item.guid: 货拉拉回应被市场监管总局约谈
item.description:
The State Administration for Market Regulation disclosed yesterday that it had previously publicly interviewed Huolala based on the "Anti-Monopoly Law of the People's Republic of China," demanding that it cease practices such as unreasonably suppressing freight prices using algorithms and enforcing exclusive vehicle stickers through platform rules. 市场监管总局昨日披露，前期已依据《中华人民共和国反垄断法》公开约谈货拉拉，要求其停止利用算法不合理压低货运价格、利用平台规则实施强制独家车贴等行为。

Huolala subsequently issued an announcement regarding the implementation of the State Administration for Market Regulation's rectification requirements. The announcement stated that in September last year, the State Administration for Market Regulation interviewed Huolala and put forward anti-monopoly compliance requirements. Huolala claimed to have "fully accepted" them and immediately began rectification, implementing multiple measures, including: 货拉拉随后发布关于落实市场监管总局整改要求的公告。公告显示，去年 9 月，市场监管总局约谈货拉拉并提出反垄断合规要求，货拉拉称已「全盘接受」，并立即开展整改，落实多项整改措施，包括：

    Formulate scientific and reasonable pricing rules, and take the lead in resisting "involutionary" pricing practices;

    Completely abolish mandatory car sticker restrictions, respecting drivers' autonomous choices;

    Reduce burdens and increase income for drivers through multiple measures;

    Strengthen the protection of drivers' rights and interests; simultaneously improve the construction of the compliance system and deepen the concept of compliant operation.

Huolala stated that it will continue to comply with laws and regulations such as the "Anti-Monopoly Law," implement regulatory requirements, continuously standardize business practices, optimize platform rules, promote algorithmic transparency, and maintain long-term stable pricing strategies, ensuring price fluctuations align with market laws. 货拉拉表示，后续将继续遵守《反垄断法》等法律规定，落实监管要求，持续规范经营行为，优化平台规则，推进算法公开透明，并保持价格策略长期稳定，使价格浮动符合市场规律。

item.title: DC 新片《超级少女》发布中国独家预告，定档 6 月 26 日
item.guid: DC-新片《超级少女》发布中国独家预告，定档-6-月-26-日
item.description:
DC's new superhero film "Supergirl" released its exclusive Chinese trailer yesterday, simultaneously announcing the official start of pre-sales in mainland China, scheduled to be released on June 26th in mainland China and North America simultaneously. DC 超英新片《超级少女》昨日发布中国独家预告片，同步宣布中国内地预售正式开启，定于 6 月 26 日在中国内地与北美同步上映。

The film is adapted from the DC comic "Supergirl: Woman of Tomorrow." The trailer presents a rather unconventional character setting: Kara appears decadent and alcoholic, with formidable combat power, yet her heart hides pain and loneliness. The story uses the injury of her beloved dog "Krypto" as an opportunity to thrust her into an interstellar adventure. 影片改编自 DC 漫画《超女：明日之女》。预告片呈现的角色设定较为反传统：卡拉外表颓废、酗酒，战斗力强悍，内心却藏着痛苦与孤独，故事以爱犬「小氪」受伤为契机，将她推入一段星际冒险。

item.title: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》发布新预告
item.guid: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》发布新预告
item.description:
"Spider-Man: A Brand New Day" has released a new official trailer, with the film scheduled to be released in mainland China on July 29th and in North America on July 31st. 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》发布新正式预告，影片已定档中国内地 7 月 29 日、北美 7 月 31 日上映。

The trailer shows that the film's story follows the events of "Spider-Man: No Way Home." After the multiverse crisis, Peter Parker is forgotten by everyone, MJ has started a new life, and Peter fights crime alone in New York, dedicating all his energy to protecting the city. 预告显示，影片故事承接《蜘蛛侠：英雄无归》事件。多元宇宙危机后，彼得·帕克被所有人遗忘，MJ 已开始新的生活，而彼得则在纽约独自打击犯罪，并将全部精力投入到保护城市之中。

As the pressure continues to mount, Peter's body undergoes new changes, and a new pattern of crime also pushes him into a greater crisis. 随着压力持续增加，彼得的身体出现新的变化，同时一种新的犯罪模式也将他推向更大的危机。

item.title: 电影《抓特务》发布「岁月无悔」预告，端午正式上映
item.guid: 电影《抓特务》发布「岁月无悔」预告，端午正式上映
item.description:
The movie "Catching Spies" released its "No Regrets" trailer and announced that pre-sales have begun, with the film officially premiering during the Dragon Boat Festival. 电影《抓特务》发布「岁月无悔」预告，并宣布预售已开启，影片将于端午正式上映。

The trailer shows that police officer Xiao Dali moves into Courtyard No. 15, Tutangdao Hutong, and begins to stake out spy Feng Jingbo day and night, thus starting a "cat and mouse game" between the police officer and the spy. 预告显示，警察肖大力搬进土唐刀胡同 15 号院，开始对特务冯静波进行日夜盯梢，两人由此展开一场警察与特务之间的「猫鼠游戏」。
